page: Hetzner Cloud cpx62 is an x86_64 virtual server powered by an AMD EPYC processor. It features 16 shared vCPUs with a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz, 31.0 GB of system memory, and 640 GB of local SSD storage. The underlying virtualization is managed via QEMU. The CPU architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AVX512F, AVX512_VNNI, AVX512_BF16, AES, and SHA_NI, which accelerate cryptographic and vector-based calculations.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates strong single-core performance, scoring 3035.28 in stress-ng single-core tests and 1968.0 in Geekbench single-core metrics. Memory performance is also a highlight, with uncached large-block read bandwidth reaching 277.56 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 137.51 GB/sec, both placing in the top 25% of tested hardware. Multi-threaded decompression via bzip3 is highly efficient at 198.15 GB/sec. However, multi-core CPU performance and database operations fall into the average tier, likely due to the shared CPU allocation model.

The cpx62 offers a cost-effective hardware profile by utilizing shared CPU resources, making it highly resource-dense for workloads that do not require dedicated, sustained CPU cores. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, web serving, software compilation, and light LLM inference tasks, particularly where high memory bandwidth and local SSD storage are beneficial.
description: Hetzner Cloud cpx62 is an x86_64 virtual server configured with 16 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 31.0 GB of RAM, and 640 GB of local SSD storage. Utilizing QEMU virtualization, this server supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AES cryptography. Benchmarks indicate strong single-core processing and high uncached memory bandwidth, with read speeds reaching 277.56 GB/sec. While multi-core performance and database operations sit in the average tier due to the shared CPU allocation, the server provides high resource density. It is suitable for multi-threaded applications, web serving, software compilation, and small-scale language model inference.
og_description: Hetzner Cloud cpx62 is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 16 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 31.0 GB of RAM, and 640 GB of local SSD storage, delivering strong single-core and memory bandwidth performance.

tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server combining sixteen shared cores, high memory bandwidth, and local SSD storage for multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 16 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs and 31.0 GB of system memory
640 GB of local SSD storage for fast data access
Strong single-core CPU and uncached memory bandwidth performance
Supports AVX-512, vector, and cryptographic instruction sets
Suitable for web serving, software compilation, and light LLM inference
